channel.title: Churn Is Dead
channel.description: Weekly CS frameworks for enterprise Customer Success leaders. Hard truths, tactical plays, and downloadable playbooks.

item.title: The Revenue Ownership Trap
item.description: t giving CS revenue ownership. They're giving CS revenue blame. Here's the 5-prerequisite framework before your team should accept a quota.

item.title: Your Customer Journey Maps Are Fiction
item.description: Enterprise CS teams waste months building beautiful journey maps that exist nowhere but PowerPoint slides.

item.title: AI Won't Save Customer Success. It'll Finish It Off.
item.description: re not investing in your team. You

item.title: Your CS Team Is Hoarding Work
item.description: Why customer success teams resist giving work back to sales and product — and how it's destroying your margins.

item.title: Customer Success Doesn't Deserve to Survive
item.description:
d expect. LinkedIn erupted with the usual chorus:
> "CS is more important than ever!"
> "Companies will regret this!"
> "We just need to prove our value!"
And here's the part nobody wants to hear:
**Most CS teams don

item.title: AI Didn't Kill Customer Success. It Exposed It.
item.description: Every CS leader is being asked: how much of Customer Success can we automate now? The answer reveals more than you think.
